allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
prompt 1: Project Init

Next.js 16.1.6, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Supabase, Prisma, Zod, Framer Motion.
Brand colors, Space Grotesk + Inter fonts, skills installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
prompt 2: supabase auth + proxy

Supabase browser/server clients, OAuth callback route, proxy.ts auth guard
for protected and admin routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy add prisma/schema.prisma prisma/migrations/20260307151429_add_orders/ src/app/\\\(public\\\)/courses/[slug]/page.tsx src/components/layout/AdminSidebar.tsx src/lib/constants.ts src/app/\\\(admin\\\)/admin/orders/ src/app/\\\(student\\\)/checkout/ src/app/api/checkout/ src/app/api/webhooks/ src/components/course/BuyButton.tsx src/lib/flitt/ src/lib/orders.ts)

Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Flitt payment integration for course purchases

Implement checkout flow with Flitt redirect method: Order model, API client with SHA1 signature,
checkout/webhook routes, BuyButton component, success/failed pages, and admin orders dashboard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Flitt checkout by wrapping request body and handling API errors

Flitt API requires params inside a { request: { ... } } wrapper — without it,
the API returns HTTP 200 with response_status "failure" which was silently ignored.
Added proper error handling for Flitt error responses and a fallback error in BuyButton.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Handle Flitt POST redirect via API routes that 302 to success/failed pages

Flitt redirects back with POST, causing 405 on the Next.js pages. Added
/api/checkout/success and /api/checkout/failed POST handlers that extract
order_id and redirect \(302 GET\) to the actual pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy add src/lib/flitt/fulfill.ts src/app/api/checkout/success/route.ts src/app/api/checkout/failed/route.ts src/app/api/webhooks/flitt/route.ts proxy.ts)

Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add fallback enrollment on checkout redirect and fix webhook reliability

The Flitt server callback can''t reach localhost, so enrollment never happened.
Extracted fulfillOrder into shared lib used by both webhook and success redirect.
The success POST handler now verifies payment and creates enrollment as fallback.
Excluded /api/webhooks from proxy matcher to avoid session overhead on S2S calls.
Added logging to webhook for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/gio/CODING/geo-ai-academy commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix checkout success handler body parsing and add full logging

The previous formData\(\).catch\(\).clone\(\).json\(\) pattern silently failed because
the body stream was consumed on the first read attempt. Now reads as raw text
first, then parses as JSON or form-urlencoded. Removed signature gate from
success redirect — just fulfill if order_status is approved. Added console.log
at every step for Vercel log debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
